birds.evidence: melanurus is found further south, between San Felipe de Aconcagua Province in the Valparaíso Region and Colchagua Province in the O'Higgins Region. The crag chilia inhabits arid scrublands with shrubby rock hillsides and cliffs with sparse vegetation
